title: Automation Editing
excerpt:
When I go to edit an automation I would like be able to add onto it. 
  
Like you see when you are creating an automation.

posts.author: bgraves (Benjamin Graves)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I go to edit an automation I would like be able to add onto it.
